Preference updated. The editor will now: Preference updated. The editor will now reload.
Shows the controls in the typography pan: Shows the controls in the typography panel by default instead of hiding them behind the ellipsis menu. Applies in the Site Editor only. The editor will reload when you change this.
Expand typography controls in the block: Expand typography controls in the block inspector
Remove the taxonomy query from the query: Remove the taxonomy query from the query loop block attributes.
Any text in a template or pattern will b: Any text in a template or pattern will be localised in a pattern.
Copy the font assets to the theme folder: Copy the font assets to the theme folder.
All patterns created in the Editor will: All patterns created in the Editor will be moved to the theme. Note that this will delete all patterns from the Editor and any references in templates will be made relative to the theme.
Reset customizations to theme styles and: Reset customisations to theme styles and settings.
Are you sure you want to reset the theme: Are you sure you want to reset the theme? This action cannot be undone.
An error occurred while resetting the th: An error occurred while resetting the theme.
Theme reset successfully. The editor wil: Theme reset successfully. The editor will now reload.
Check out the project on GitHub.
Themes created with Create Block Theme d: Themes created with Create Block Theme don't require Create Block Theme to be installed on the site where the theme is used.
Create Block Theme is a tool to help you: Create Block Theme is a tool to help you make Block Themes using the WordPress Editor. It does this by adding tools to the Editor to help you create and manage your theme.

Image filename

Image license
Credits for the images bundled with the: Credits for the images bundled with the theme.
Credits and licensing information for fo: Credits and licensing information for fonts used in the theme.
Error getting font licenses. Code: %1$s. Message: %2$s
Remove Navigation Refs from the theme re: Remove Navigation Refs from the theme returning your navigation to the default state.
Any images in a template or pattern will: Any images in a template or pattern will be copied to a local /assets folder and referenced from there via a pattern.
Process only templates you have modified: Process only templates you have modified in the Editor. Any templates you have not modified will be left as is.
Save Template and Template Part changes: Save Template and Template Part changes made in the Editor to the theme.
Save Global Styles values set in the Edi: Save Global Styles values set in the Editor to the theme.
Save activated fonts in the Font Library: Save activated fonts in the Font Library to the theme. Remove deactivated theme fonts from the theme.
Create a child theme that uses this them: Create a child theme that uses this theme as a parent. This theme will remain unchanged and the user changes will be preserved in the new child theme.
Would you like to clone this Theme or cr: Would you like to clone this Theme or create a Child Theme?
Theme created successfully. The editor w: Theme created successfully. The editor will now reload.
Create a clone of this theme with a new: Create a clone of this theme with a new name. The user changes will be preserved in the new theme.
An error occurred while attempting to ex: An error occurred while attempting to export the theme.
Child theme created successfully. The ed: Child theme created successfully. The editor will now reload.
An error occurred while attempting to cr: An error occurred while attempting to create the theme.
Save the Global Styles changes as a them: Save the Global Styles changes as a theme variation.
List the recommended plugins for this th: List the recommended plugins for this theme. e.g. contact forms, social media. Plugins must be from the WordPress.org plugin repository.
An error occurred while attempting to sa: An error occurred while attempting to save the theme.
Theme saved successfully. The editor wil: Theme saved successfully. The editor will now reload.
Create a blank theme with no styles or t: Create a blank theme with no styles or templates.
Theme variation created successfully. Th: Theme variation created successfully. The editor will now reload.
An error occurred while attempting to cr: An error occurred while attempting to create the theme variation.
Theme cloned successfully. The editor wi: Theme cloned successfully. The editor will now reload.
An error occurred while attempting to up: An error occurred while attempting to update the theme.
Theme updated successfully. The editor w: Theme updated successfully. The editor will now reload.
Edit Metadata properties of the current: Edit Metadata properties of the current theme.
